name: Verify footer bottom bar displays the correct copyright text

steps.name: Given  I am on the Sauce Demo homepage
Then  I should see the text "Copyright © 2026 Sauce Demo." in the footer bottom bar

labels.name: story
labels.value: Verify footer bottom bar displays the correct copyright text

labels.name: testClass
